# Web cache: "centeral dogma" molecular biology DNA RNA protein information flow

> 时间: 2026-03-07 14:48


## 1. 
- 来源: duckduckgo

The central dogma of molecular biology deals with the flow of genetic information within a biological system. It is often stated as " DNA makes RNA , and RNA makes protein ", [1] although this is not its original meaning. 2 days ago · Central dogma. The central dogma of molecular biology is a theory stating that genetic information flows only in one direction , from DNA, to RNA, to protein, or RNA directly to protein.
